items.title: Bentley Torcal EV: Price, Specs, Availability
items.summary: The 300-mile Torcal arrives in September, but considering what's come before with Ferrari, Porsche and Mercedes, has the company timed its EV entry right?

items.title: Apple Brings Back Card Payments for App Store and iCloud Transactions in India After Five Years
items.summary: Apple has resumed support for credit and debit card payments for App Store and iCloud transactions in India. The move marks a return of the payment methods in the country after...
